commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content:
Within. Hebrew nehtsar, "detained, or assembles before the Lord. "Theodoret thinks he was possessed; others believe he had made a vow
Edomite. Some Greek copies read, a Syrian, as also chap. xxii. 9. (Calmet)
He had embraced the Jewish religion. (Menochius)
